attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
  NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
  NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
  'Y' AS DV_REVENUE_FLG,
  CASE  WHEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID='SERVICE'  THEN 
      CASE WHEN NP.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID= 'CHARGES' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'  END
      ELSE 'N' 
      END DV_CHARGES_FLG,
  '=' AS DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG, 
    CASE  WHEN SUBSTR(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,1,4)= 'MISC' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END DV_MISC_FLG,
  '=' AS DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,   
  CASE WHEN NCA.ERP_REVENUE_CUSTOMER_FLAG = 'I' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG     ,
  CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE ,1,2) ='41' THEN 'Y' 
    WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,2) ='42' THEN 'Y'
    WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,3)='433' THEN 'Y' 
    ELSE 'N'   END DV_SERVICE_FLG,
    'Y' MAJOR_LINE_FLG,  
  CASE WHEN ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER IS NULL OR NSTT.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'UNKNOWN'  OR NSTT.BK_SALES_HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE   <> 'CORP. REVENUE' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END  DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG_TEMP  ,
  '=' SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG  
  FROM  
  $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_ACRL_CG  NCR

    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX  ACRL
    ON (ACRL.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY = NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY)
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_ACRL_KEY1_CG KEY1
    ON NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID=KEY1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
 
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
    ON ACRL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
    ON(ACRL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV NSTT
  ON NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = NSTT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  AND NSTT.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'  
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE   NECAL
    ON (NECAL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY = KEY1.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)  -- RECHECK IN EXISTING USED FROM NAT
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA
    ON (NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NECAL.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY)
 
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
   ON(NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT)
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
   ON (NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE = ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER )
UNION ALL
SELECT 
   NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
   NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
   --'Y' AS DV_REVENUE_FLG,
 

  CASE WHEN ACRL.ACCT_CLASS_CD IN ('LT_CONTRACT_ASSETS','CONTRACT_ASSETS') THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS DV_REVENUE_FLG,
   CASE  WHEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID='SERVICE'  THEN 
       CASE WHEN NP.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID= 'CHARGES' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'  END
       ELSE 'N' 
       END DV_CHARGES_FLG,
   '=' AS DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG, 
     CASE  WHEN SUBSTR(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,1,4)= 'MISC' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END DV_MISC_FLG,
   '=' AS DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,   
   CASE WHEN NCA.ERP_REVENUE_CUSTOMER_FLAG = 'I' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG     ,
   CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE ,1,2) ='41' THEN 'Y' 
     WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,2) ='42' THEN 'Y'
     WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,3)='433' THEN 'Y' 
     ELSE 'N' 
  END DV_SERVICE_FLG,


     'Y' MAJOR_LINE_FLG,  
   CASE WHEN ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER IS NULL OR NSTT.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'UNKNOWN'  
OR NSTT.BK_SALES_HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE   <> 'CORP. REVENUE' OR ACRL.ACCT_CLASS_CD IN ('LT_CONTRACT_ASSETS','CONTRACT_ASSETS') THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END  DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG_TEMP  ,
   '=' SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG  
   FROM  
   $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_ACRL_CG  NCR
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX  ACRL
     ON (ACRL.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY = NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY)
   INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_ACRL_KEY1_CG KEY1
     ON NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID=KEY1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
  
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
     ON ACRL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
     ON(ACRL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV NSTT
   ON NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = NSTT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
   AND NSTT.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'  
   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE   NECAL
     ON (NECAL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY = KEY1.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)  -- RECHECK IN EXISTING USED FROM NAT
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA
     ON (NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NECAL.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY)
  
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
    ON(NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT)
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
    ON (NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE = ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER )  AND ACRL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD <>'Accruals_om'
	
	union all /* Flexi Invoice */
	
	   SELECT
    NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID,
    NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
    CASE WHEN NSOTT_NEW.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG = '=' 
     OR NSOTT_NEW.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG IS NULL 
     THEN 'Y' ELSE NSOTT_NEW.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG END
   as DV_REVENUE_FLG,  
   CASE  WHEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID='SERVICE'  THEN 
     CASE WHEN NP.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID= 'CHARGES' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'  END
     ELSE 'N' 
     END DV_CHARGES_FLG,
   '=' AS  DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,    
    CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,1,4)= 'MISC' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END DV_MISC_FLG,
    '=' AS DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
    CASE WHEN NCA.ERP_REVENUE_CUSTOMER_FLAG = 'I' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END  DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
    CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,2) ='41' THEN 'Y' 
     WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,2) ='42' THEN 'Y'
     WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,3)='433' THEN 'Y' 
     ELSE 'N' 
     END DV_SERVICE_FLG,
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(NSOLN.MAJOR_LINE_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') = 'MAJOR' THEN 'Y' 
     WHEN COALESCE(NSOLN.MAJOR_LINE_TYPE,'UNKNOWN')= 'MINOR' THEN 'N'
     END MAJOR_LINE_FLG,
     CASE WHEN ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER IS NULL OR NSTT.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'UNKNOWN' 
     OR NSTT.BK_SALES_HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE <> 'CORP. REVENUE' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG_TMP,
    '=' SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG  
    FROM
    $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_ACRL_CG NCR
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX NRA
      ON NRA.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY=NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
     ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME) 
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
     ON NRA.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
     ON(NRA.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
    
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOLN
     ON (SMSOLN.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID 
     AND SMSOLN.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE )
    
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  NSOLN
     ON ( SMSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
   AND NSOLN.END_TV_DATETIME = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' )
     
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV NSTT
    ON NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = NSTT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
    AND NSTT.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'  
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE   NECAL
      ON (NECAL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY = NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY) 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA
      ON (NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NECAL.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY)
      
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO
     ON( NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID = SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  
            AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SSO.SS_CODE)
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV  NSORDTV
     ON(SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY
     AND NSORDTV.END_TV_DATETIME =  '3500-01-01 00:00:00' )
   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV ORD_LN_V
    ON(NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = ORD_LN_V.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
    AND ORD_LN_V.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00')
    
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_TV NSOTT_NEW 
    ON ORD_LN_V.SO_LINE_TYPE_NAME=NSOTT_NEW.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME
   AND NSOTT_NEW.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
    
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
     ON(NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT)
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
     ON (NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE = ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER )
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
      WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
      AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
    AND  ( SMSOLN.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL)
    AND ( NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  IS NOT NULL) AND NRA.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD ='Accruals_om'
      
   UNION ALL
   SELECT
   NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID,
   NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
  
    CASE WHEN NSOTT_NEW.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG = '=' 
     OR NSOTT_NEW.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG IS NULL 
     THEN 'Y' ELSE NSOTT_NEW.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG END
   as DV_REVENUE_FLG, 
   
   
   CASE  WHEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID='SERVICE'  THEN 
    CASE WHEN NP.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID= 'CHARGES' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'  END
    ELSE 'N' 
    END DV_CHARGES_FLG,
   
   '=' AS  DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,   
   CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,1,4)= 'MISC' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END DV_MISC_FLG,
   
   '=' AS DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,   
   CASE WHEN NCA.ERP_REVENUE_CUSTOMER_FLAG = 'I' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END  DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
   CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,2) ='41' THEN 'Y' 
    WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,2) ='42' THEN 'Y'
    WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,3)='433' THEN 'Y' 
    ELSE 'N' 
    END DV_SERVICE_FLG,
   'Y' MAJOR_LINE_FLG,
   CASE WHEN ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER IS NULL OR NSTT.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'UNKNOWN'  OR NSTT.BK_SALES_HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE <> 'CORP. REVENUE' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG_TMP,
   '=' SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG  FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_ACRL_CG NCR
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX NRA
      ON NRA.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY=NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
     ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME) 
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
     ON NRA.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
     ON(NRA.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
  
     
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOLN
    ON (SMSOLN.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID 
    AND SMSOLN.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE )
   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  NSOLN
    ON ( SMSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
    AND NSOLN.END_TV_DATETIME = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' )
    
    
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV NSTT
    ON NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = NSTT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
    AND NSTT.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE   NECAL
     ON (NECAL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY = NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY) 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA
     ON (NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NECAL.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY)
   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO
    ON( NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID = SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  
           AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SSO.SS_CODE)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV  NSORDTV
    ON(SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY
    AND NSORDTV.END_TV_DATETIME =  '3500-01-01 00:00:00' )
  
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV ORD_LN_V
    ON(NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = ORD_LN_V.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
    AND ORD_LN_V.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' )
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_TV NSOTT_NEW    /*     added as part of Cf LSS CR post Q3FY15 */
    ON ORD_LN_V.SO_LINE_TYPE_NAME=NSOTT_NEW.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME
   AND NSOTT_NEW.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
    ON(NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
    ON (NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE = ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER )
   WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
     WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
     AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)       AND NRA.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD ='Accruals_om'

SELECT 
NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' THEN 100.00
WHEN ACRL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME='Immediate' AND ACRL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY<0 THEN 100.00
WHEN ACRL.ACCT_CLASS_CD = 'REVENUE' THEN
CASE
WHEN TIME_BOUND_CRDT_APLD_FLG='Y' AND ACRL.TSV_TRXL_AMT=0 THEN 100.00/* added as a part of Dec2020 release*/
WHEN ACRL.TSV_TRXL_AMT=0 OR ACRL.OFFR_ATTR_PCT=0 THEN 0.00
ELSE
/*ABS((ACRL.RU_DEBIT_TRXL_AMT+ACRL.RU_CREDIT_TRXL_AMT)/(ACRL.TSV_TRXL_AMT *(ACRL.OFFR_ATTR_PCT/100))*100) END*/
Abs((ACRL.RU_DEBIT_TRXL_AMT+ACRL.RU_CREDIT_TRXL_AMT)/(ACRL.TSV_TRXL_AMT * (Cast(ACRL.OFFR_ATTR_PCT AS DECIMAL(18,6))/100))*100) 
END
ELSE 100
END AS TRX_LINE_PERCENT
FROM   $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_ACRL_CG NCR
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX ACRL
ON ACRL.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY=NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY

SELECT
   NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
   NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
   NCR.ACCOUNT_CLASS,  
   /*CASE WHEN NARL.ACCOUTING_RULE_NAME='Immediate' THEN COALESCE(DIA.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD , 'UNKNOWN') ELSE
   CASE WHEN (NFDM.BK_DEAL_ID IS NOT NULL AND DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV') THEN CASE WHEN DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y' THEN 'As Invoiced-FCM Service'  ELSE 'As Invoiced-FCM Product' END
    ELSE  'As Invoiced' END 
   END AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,*/
    CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,2) ='41' THEN 'Y' 
    WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,2) ='42' THEN 'Y'
    WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,3)='433' THEN 'Y' 
    ELSE 'N' 
    END DV_SERVICE_FLG,
   CASE
   WHEN ACRL.FUTURE_BILLING_PROCESS_FLG='Y' THEN NCR.TRX_TYPE                      
   WHEN (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE 'ICMS%'  OR  ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE = 'AR-REBILLING') AND NAT.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL' AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='INV' THEN 'DM' 
   WHEN EL_TRX.SECONDARY_INV_FLG = 'Y' AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN 'DM'
   ELSE NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE END AS DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
   CASE WHEN ACRL.FUTURE_BILLING_PROCESS_FLG='Y' THEN CAST('Future Billing System' AS CHAR(30))    
   WHEN (NFDM.BK_DEAL_ID IS NOT NULL AND DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV') THEN CASE WHEN DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y' THEN 'As Invoiced-FCM Service' ELSE 'As Invoiced-FCM Product' END
   ELSE  'As Invoiced' END ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
   NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE as DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD,
   NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE as DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
   -7777 AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,   -- IT WILL BE DEFAULT -9999
  /*NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,*/
   CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE='INV' THEN NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
        ELSE NECALU_BILL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY END BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   CASE WHEN NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY>0 THEN NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ELSE SOL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
   NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
   -7777 AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, -- IN OA_S ITS -7777
   NAT.AR_TRX_KEY AS AR_TRX_KEY  ,    
   /*CASE WHEN /*ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS') 
          ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%') /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL
        THEN NATL_PAR.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY
           ELSE NAT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,*/      
   CASE WHEN NATL.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY>0 THEN NATL.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY ELSE SOL.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY  END  SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,    
   NP.ITEM_KEY PRODUCT_KEY,
   -9980 AS DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY, 
      CAST ( NULL AS VARCHAR(50) ) SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM, 
   /*CASE WHEN NARL.ACCOUTING_RULE_NAME='Immediate' THEN 'ERP_ADJ' ELSE 
   NCR.TRX_TYPE AS TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,  */
    NCR.TRX_TYPE AS TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,  -- FOR IMMEDIATE REV IT WILL BE 'UNKNOWN'
   NAT.RU_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
   -7777 AS MAJOR_LINE_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
   'UNKNOWN' AS DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
    CAST ( NULL AS VARCHAR(32) ) as SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
   'UNKNOWN' AS DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD,
    -999 AS WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
   'UNKNOWN' AS SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
    NULL AS BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
    CAST(NCR.TRANSACTION_DATE AS DATE) AS SHIPPED_DT,
    CAST(NAT1.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT
  
   
   FROM 
   $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_ACRL_CG  NCR
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
    ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX  ACRL
    ON (ACRL.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY = NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT UNIQUE_ID,BID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXCFIR_REV_ACRL 
   QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY UNIQUE_ID ORDER BY EDW_UPDATE_DTM DESC) =1) EL
   ON ACRL.SK_LINE_REF_NUM=EL.UNIQUE_ID 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_BILL
   ON (NECALU_BILL.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = EL.BID)
   
   /*INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
   ON ACRL.SK_LINE_REF_NUM=CAST(NSOL.BK_LINE_REF_NUM AS BIGINT) -- RECHECK
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
   ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY*/
   
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
     ON ACRL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
      ON(ACRL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
	  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT1
      ON ( NAT.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY = NAT1.AR_TRX_KEY)
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
      ON( NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE         
      AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
      AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT. BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE ) 
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
    ON(NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT=  NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID)
 
/*  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_DIRECT_INDIRECT_ADJ_TYPE DIA
     ON DIA.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD = ACRL.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD*/ 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE  ABT
     ON ABT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY 
    /*IF FCM DEAL INFO IS REQUIRED*/
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SOL
   ON ACRL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  = SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY -- DERIVED USING ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM
  
   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER  SO
   ON SOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY=SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY  
   LEFT JOIN (SELECT BK_DEAL_ID FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FCM_DEAL_MAPPING GROUP BY 1) NFDM
   ON NFDM.BK_DEAL_ID=SO.BK_DEAL_ID
   LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX EL_TRX
   ON NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = EL_TRX.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
   AND EL_TRX.GLOBAL_NAME='CG'  /*END*/
   WHERE (
   (NECALU_BILL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY IS NOT NULL)
   OR NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY<>(-999) /*NO RECORDS HAVE -999 AS BILLTO VALUE FOR VALID AR TRX LINE KEYS*/
   )

   /*CASE WHEN NARL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME='Immediate' THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE 'LINE' END AS LINE_TYPE_CD, */

   NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT   ,
   NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   ,
   NCR.FISCAL_ID DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  ,
   CASE WHEN NARL.ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED' THEN -7777 ELSE NARL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
   NCR.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
   -7777 AS BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
   EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
   -999 AS SK_GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT,
   NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY AS AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY, 
   NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD ,
   NCR.SALES_REP_NUMBER AS SALES_REP_NUM,
   CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE= 'REV' THEN 'GL' ELSE 'INV' END AS TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,     
  /*CASE WHEN ( SUBSTR(SORR.NAME,1,8)='VARIABLE' OR UPPER(SORR.NAME) = 'DAILY RATES' ) THEN 'GL' ELSE  'INV_GL' END                
  WHEN  NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE= 'INV' THEN 'INV'
  ELSE  'ADJ' END TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,*/
   EVNGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
   NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME AS INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME,  -- FOR IMMEDIATE VALUE WILL BE 'UNKNOWN'
   NARL.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY 
   FROM 
   $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_ACRL_CG  NCR
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
    ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)

    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL

   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
    ON(NARL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
      ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
   ON (NCR.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT )
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT EVNGLA

SELECT 
     NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
     NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
        CASE WHEN COALESCE(((CASE WHEN (NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'Trade-In Return' AND UPPER(NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE) <> 'MIXED')
         THEN 0 ELSE NSOLN.UNIT_LIST_PRICE END)),0) <> 0 THEN
      CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE IN ('INV','REV') THEN 
      COALESCE(
       CASE WHEN (CAST(NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) < NPPT.START_TV_DATE) THEN 0.0000000
       ELSE CAST( ((NPPT.LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT*NRA.OFFR_ATTR_PCT)/100.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
       END,0.0000000) 
      ELSE 0.0000000
      END
     ELSE 0.0000000
     END USD_BASE_PRICE,
  
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(((CASE WHEN (NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'Trade-In Return' AND UPPER(NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE) <> 'MIXED')
          THEN 0 ELSE NSOLN.ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_TRXL_AMT END)),0) <> 0 THEN
       CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE IN ('INV','REV') THEN 
       COALESCE(
        CASE WHEN (CAST(NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) < NPPT.START_TV_DATE) THEN 0.0000000
        ELSE CAST( ((NSOLN.ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_TRXL_AMT*NRA.OFFR_ATTR_PCT)/100.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
        END,0.0000000) 
       ELSE 0.0000000
       END
      ELSE 0.0000000
      END ORIG_UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
      
      
     CASE WHEN COALESCE(((CASE WHEN (NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'Trade-In Return' AND UPPER(NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE) <> 'MIXED')
          THEN 0 ELSE NSOLN.ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_TRXL_AMT END)),0) <> 0 THEN
       CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE IN ('INV','REV') THEN 
       COALESCE(
        CASE WHEN (CAST(NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) < NPPT.START_TV_DATE) THEN 0.0000000
        ELSE CAST( ((NSOLN.ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_TRXL_AMT*NRA.OFFR_ATTR_PCT)/100.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
        END,0.0000000) 
       ELSE 0.0000000
       END
      ELSE 0.0000000
      END ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
   
       FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_ACRL_CG NCR
     INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
      ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX NRA
   ON NRA.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY=NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL

   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP

     INNER JOIN (

          MAX(NPPT1.START_TV_DATE) MAX_START_DATE
           FROM
          $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_ACRL_CG NCR1
          INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
        ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR1.GLOBAL_NAME)
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX  NRA
   ON NRA.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY=NCR1.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
   ON NRA.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT1
   ON(NRA.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT1.AR_TRX_KEY) 
   
   /*INNER JOIN (SELECT RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,PRODUCT_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_MERAKI_REVENUE_TRX WHERE ATTRIBUTION_TYPE='OFFSET' GROUP BY 1,2,3) NRA_PAR
   ON NRA.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NRA_PAR.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  
                   
          INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP1
         ON(NP1.ITEM_KEY = NRA_PAR.PRODUCT_KEY)*/
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP1
            ON(NP1.ITEM_KEY  = NRA.DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY)
          INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_PRICE_TV NPPT1
        ON(NPPT1.ITEM_KEY = NP1.ITEM_KEY
        AND NPPT1.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME = 'Base Price List'
        AND CAST(NAT1.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) BETWEEN NPPT1.START_TV_DATE AND NPPT1.END_TV_DATE
          )
           GROUP BY
          NCR1.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,

       ) MAX_DATE
     ON(MAX_DATE.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
      AND MAX_DATE.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME
      AND MAX_DATE.ITEM_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
      AND MAX_DATE.MAX_START_DATE = NPPT.START_TV_DATE)
      
      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOLN
      ON (SMSOLN.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID 
      AND SMSOLN.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE )
  
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  NSOLN
      ON ( SMSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO    
      ON (NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID = SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  
      AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SSO.SS_CODE)
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV   
      ON (SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT   
      ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
      
     WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
       WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
       AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
   AND ( SMSOLN.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT IS NOT NULL ) 
    AND (  NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL)   AND NRA.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD= 'Accruals_OM'
     
    UNION ALL
   SELECT 
    NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
   NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
   0 USD_BASE_PRICE,
   0 ORIG_UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
   0 ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
    FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_acrl_CG NCR   
	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX NRA /* Flexi Scope*/
   ON NRA.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY=NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
   WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
      WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
      AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)     AND NRA.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD= 'Accruals_OM'

SELECT 
      TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID ,
      GLOBAL_NAME ,
      GL_DISTRIB_FUNC_AMT ,
      GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
      REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
      DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
      DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
      DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT ,
      DV_EXTENDED_QTY ,
      DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
      DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT ,
      DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT, 
      ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT,
   ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT
      FROM (
     SELECT
       NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
       NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
       COALESCE(CAST(
       (CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' THEN 
        CAST(NCR.AMOUNT * (CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE 
           THEN 1.000000
           ELSE  CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15))
              END) 
        AS DECIMAL(26,7))
        ELSE NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT
       END)* COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100.0000000)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)   GL_DISTRIB_FUNC_AMT,
       CAST(COALESCE(NCR.AMOUNT * COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100)/100,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
       CAST(COALESCE(NCR.REBATE_AMOUNT,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))     REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT, 
       CAST(
       COALESCE(
       (CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG,'N') = 'Y' THEN 0.0000000 ELSE
        
         CAST
         ( CAST((CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'REV' THEN CAST(NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7))
           WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' THEN  CAST(NCR.AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
            CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 
            ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) 
            END 
           ELSE 0.0000000
          END) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
         CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
         COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)/100
        
        
           END),0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))    DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
      COALESCE(CAST(
      CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG ,'N') = 'Y' 
        THEN 0.0000000 
        ELSE ( CASE WHEN NCR.TRX_TYPE = 'DM' 
             THEN CASE  WHEN (NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'RMA with Credit' 
                   OR
                   (UPPER(NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME) ='RMA WITH CREDIT' AND NSOL.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE ='RETURN')) 
                 THEN WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY 
                 ELSE 0.0000000
               END
             ELSE WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY
           END) 
      END *  (WDNRTBP.DV_REV_BASE_PRICE_AMT)  AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)      DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
      
     0.0000 AS   DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
        CASE WHEN  (EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS')) AND UPPER(NACAR.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10) = 'CREDIT_REBILL' AND  NCR.TRX_TYPE = 'CM' THEN 0 
        ELSE WDNRTEQ.DV_EXTENDED_QTY END   DV_EXTENDED_QTY , 
       NRA.OFFR_ATTR_PCT AS ATTRIBUTED_PERCENT, 
        /* OA Q1FY15 >> */
     CASE WHEN NRA.ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'OFFSET' THEN 
    CAST( (NSOLN.UNIT_LIST_PRICE) /*knarlapu:/(case when (DV_EXTENDED_QTY) = 0.0000000 then 1.0000000 else ABS(DV_EXTENDED_QTY) end )*/ AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ELSE (
    CAST( ((ATTRIBUTED_PERCENT/100.0000000)* NSOLN.UNIT_LIST_PRICE) /*/(case when (DV_EXTENDED_QTY) = 0.0000000 then 1.0000000 else ABS(DV_EXTENDED_QTY) end )*/ AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ) END * (
    CASE WHEN NCR.TRX_TYPE = 'CM' AND NRA.ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'ATTRIBUTED' THEN (-1) ELSE 1 END)  as UNIT_PRICE, /*RECHECK THIS LOGIC*/
      /* << OA Q1FY15 */
      CAST(COALESCE(CAST(CAST( 
      (
       CASE WHEN NCR.TRX_TYPE = 'DM' 
         THEN CASE 
             WHEN (NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'RMA with Credit' 
                OR
               (UPPER(NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME) ='RMA WITH CREDIT' AND NSOL.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE ='RETURN'))
             /* rivijay: commented to use top SKU qty 
       THEN WDNRTEQ.DV_EXTENDED_QTY */
       THEN WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY
             ELSE 0.0000000
           END
         /* rivijay: commented to use top SKU qty 
      ELSE WDNRTEQ.DV_EXTENDED_QTY  */
      ELSE WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY
      END
      ) *
      ( CASE WHEN NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME= 'Trade-In Return' 
         THEN 0.0000000 
         ELSE 
         CAST(UNIT_PRICE AS DECIMAL(26,7))
       END
      ) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
      *
      ( CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE 
         THEN 1.0000000  
         ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15))
       END  
      )AS DECIMAL(26,7))* 
      CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)),0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT,
      
       CAST(
       COALESCE( CASE WHEN NATL1.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE = 'LINE' THEN
        COALESCE(
        CAST(CAST(
        CAST(COALESCE(NCR.REBATE_AMOUNT,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
        CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1.000000 
         ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15))  END AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
        CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(26,7))*
        CAST(COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100) AS DECIMAL(26,7))/100,0.0000000)
       ELSE 0.0000000
       END , 0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))     DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT ,
  
  CAST( (CASE WHEN NRA.ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED' THEN (ATTRIBUTED_PERCENT/100.0000000)
              WHEN NRA.ATTRIBUTION_CD='STANDALONE' THEN 100
              ELSE (-1) END) *  /*NEGATIVE FOR OFFSET*/
      COALESCE(
      (CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG,'N') = 'Y' THEN 0.0000000 ELSE
        CAST
        ( CAST(( CAST(
          (CASE WHEN NCR.TRX_TYPE IN ('INV') 
           THEN COALESCE(WIPA.DV_PURC_ADJ_PCT_AMT,0.0000000)
        WHEN NCR.TRX_TYPE IN ('CM')
        THEN CASE WHEN NSORDTV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME LIKE '%RMA%'
                  THEN COALESCE(WIPA.DV_PURC_ADJ_PCT_AMT,0.0000000) 
         ELSE 0.0000000 END
        ELSE 0.0000000 
      END) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) *
           CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 
           ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) 
           END ) AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) *
        CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
     (COALESCE(CAST(TLP.TRX_LINE_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(27,12)),100)/100) *
        COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)/100
          END),0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))    DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT,
    
    
 
   COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)/100 * 
  COALESCE( CAST((CAST(COALESCE(cast( CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'REV' THEN 1
                                    WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' THEN   
                                   CAST(CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1.0000000  
                                 ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15))
                            END   AS decimal(26,7))
                                             ELSE 0.0000000
                      END AS DECIMAL(26,7))*
   CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)),0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)))
       * (WDNRTBP.ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE)  AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)       ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT,
 
 COALESCE(CAST(
       CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG ,'N') = 'Y' 
         THEN 0.0000000 
         ELSE ( CASE WHEN NCR.TRX_TYPE = 'DM' 
              THEN CASE  WHEN (NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'RMA with Credit' 
                    OR
                    (UPPER(NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME) ='RMA WITH CREDIT' AND NSOL.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE ='RETURN')) 
                  THEN WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY 
                  ELSE 0.0000000
                END
              ELSE WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY
            END) 
       END * /*CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(26,7))*/
      (CAST(COALESCE(cast( CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'REV' THEN 1
                                    WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' THEN   
                                   CAST(CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1.0000000  
                                 ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15))
                            END   AS decimal(26,7))
                                             ELSE 0.0000000
                      END AS DECIMAL(26,7))*
   CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)),0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)))
       * (WDNRTBP.ORIG_UNIT_LIST_PRICE)  AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)      ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT 
    
         FROM
       $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_ACRL_CG NCR
       INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
        ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX NRA
    ON NRA.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY=NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
    ON(NRA.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY) 
     
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NBS 
      ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NBS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
       ON (NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
       AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
       AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
      INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
       ON(NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
       AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL.SS_CODE)
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
       ON (NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
    
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOLN
        ON (SMSOLN.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID 
        AND SMSOLN.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE )
         LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOLN
        ON ( SMSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
     
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
        ON(NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)
     
  /*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION NSOL_OA
  ON NRA.OFFER_ATTR_ID_INT=NSOL_OA.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   */
  /*FOR STANDALONE THIS WILL BE NULL BECAUSE DEFAULT VALUE IN OUR 3NF IS -999 WHEREAS IN NSOL_OA ITS -9999*/
      
       LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EORCTL
                       ON ( EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
                           AND EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME )
     
      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX NACAR
      ON NACAR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID  = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
      AND NACAR.GLOBAL_NAME     = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME
           
       LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
        ON (NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE =ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)
      
       LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO    
        ON (NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID = SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  
        AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SSO.SS_CODE)
       LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV   
        ON (SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
       LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT   
        ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
        
      LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL  
        ON (NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID = NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT  
        AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSOL.SS_CODE)   
    
      
       LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_INV
        ON(NCCDR_INV.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE          
        AND NCCDR_INV.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE
        AND NCCDR_INV.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NCR.GL_DT 
        AND NCCDR_INV.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate')
       LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_FUNC
        ON (NCCDR_FUNC.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE
        AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD'
        AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NCR.GL_DT 
        AND NCCDR_FUNC.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate') 
       LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_ACRL_EXT_QTY_OM WDNRTEQ
        ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = WDNRTEQ.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
        AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = WDNRTEQ.GLOBAL_NAME )
       LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_ACRL_BASE_PRC_OM WDNRTBP
        ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = WDNRTBP.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
        AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = WDNRTBP.GLOBAL_NAME )
   /*PRMADDAL: Added as part of Q1FY18 SOT XAAS*/
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL1
    ON NRA.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_TRXNL_PURC_ADJ_PCT_ACRL_OM WIPA
    ON(NATL1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT=WIPA.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = WIPA.GLOBAL_NAME)
    /*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_TRXNL_PERCENT_OM TLP
    ON (TLP.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID=NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID)*/
	
	INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_TRXNL_PERCENT_acrl_CG TLP
  ON NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = TLP.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
  
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
         WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
         AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
      AND (SMSOLN.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL)
      AND ( NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL)
      
      UNION ALL
      
      SELECT
      NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
      NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
      COALESCE(CAST(
      (CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' THEN 
       CAST(NCR.AMOUNT * (CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE 
          THEN 1.000000
          ELSE  CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(27,8))
             END) 
       AS DECIMAL(26,7))
       ELSE NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT
      END)* COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100.0000000)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)   GL_DISTRIB_FUNC_AMT,
      CAST(COALESCE(NCR.AMOUNT * COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100)/100,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
      CAST(COALESCE(NCR.REBATE_AMOUNT,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))     REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT, 
      CAST(
      COALESCE(
      (CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG,'N') = 'Y' THEN 0.0000000 ELSE
       
        CAST
        ( CAST((CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'REV' THEN CAST(NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7))
          WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' THEN  CAST(NCR.AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
           CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 
           ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(27,8)) 
           END 
          ELSE 0.0000000
         END) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
        CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(27,8)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
        COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)/100
     
      END),0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))    DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
      COALESCE(CAST(
      CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG ,'N') = 'Y' THEN 0.0000000 ELSE
      ( CASE WHEN NCR.TRX_TYPE = 'DM' THEN 
     CASE  
                 WHEN (NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'RMA with Credit' 
                   OR
                   (UPPER(NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME) ='RMA WITH CREDIT' AND NSOL.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE ='RETURN')) 
                 THEN 
                WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY
                 ELSE 0.0000000
               END
             ELSE 
       WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY
           END) 
      END *  (WDNRTBP.DV_REV_BASE_PRICE_AMT)  AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)   DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
      0.0000 AS DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
     
      CASE WHEN  (EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS')) AND  
      UPPER(NACAR.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10) = 'CREDIT_REBILL' AND  NCR.TRX_TYPE = 'CM' THEN 0 
        ELSE WDNRTEQ.DV_EXTENDED_QTY  END     DV_EXTENDED_QTY ,  
         /* OA Q1FY15 >> */
      0 AS ATTRIBUTED_PERCENT,
      0 AS UNIT_PRICE,
      /* << OA Q1FY15 */
      0 DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT,
      CAST(
      COALESCE( CASE WHEN NATL1.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE = 'LINE' THEN
       COALESCE(
       CAST(CAST(
       CAST(COALESCE(NCR.REBATE_AMOUNT,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
       CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1.000000 
        ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(27,8))  END AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
       CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(27,8)) AS DECIMAL(26,7))*
       CAST(COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100) AS DECIMAL(26,7))/100,0.0000000)
      ELSE 0.0000000
      END , 0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))     DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT,
     CAST(
        (CASE WHEN NRA.ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED' THEN (ATTRIBUTED_PERCENT/100.0000000)
           WHEN NRA.ATTRIBUTION_CD='STANDALONE' THEN 100
              ELSE (-1) END) *  /*NEGATIVE FOR OFFSET*/
      COALESCE(
      (CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG,'N') = 'Y' THEN 0.0000000 ELSE
        CAST
        ( CAST(( CAST(
          (CASE WHEN NCR.TRX_TYPE IN ('INV') 
           THEN COALESCE(WIPA.DV_PURC_ADJ_PCT_AMT,0.0000000)
        WHEN NCR.TRX_TYPE IN ('CM')
        THEN CASE WHEN NSORDTV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME LIKE '%RMA%'
                  THEN COALESCE(WIPA.DV_PURC_ADJ_PCT_AMT,0.0000000) 
         ELSE 0.0000000 END
        ELSE 0.0000000 
      END) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) *
           CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 
           ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) 
           END ) AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) *
        CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
     (COALESCE(CAST(TLP.TRX_LINE_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(27,12)),100)/100) *
        COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)/100
          END),0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))    DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT,
 
 
 
   COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)/100 * 
  COALESCE( CAST((CAST(COALESCE(cast( CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'REV' THEN 1
                                    WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' THEN   
                                   CAST(CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1.0000000  
                                 ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15))
                            END   AS decimal(26,7))
                                             ELSE 0.0000000
                      END AS DECIMAL(26,7))*
   CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)),0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)))
       * (WDNRTBP.ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE)  AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)       ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT,
 
 COALESCE(CAST(
       CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG ,'N') = 'Y' 
         THEN 0.0000000 
         ELSE ( CASE WHEN NCR.TRX_TYPE = 'DM' 
              THEN CASE  WHEN (NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'RMA with Credit' 
                    OR
                    (UPPER(NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME) ='RMA WITH CREDIT' AND NSOL.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE ='RETURN')) 
                  THEN WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY 
                  ELSE 0.0000000
                END
              ELSE WDNRTEQ.TOP_DV_EXTENDED_QTY
            END) 
       END * /*CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(26,7))*/
      (CAST(COALESCE(cast( CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'REV' THEN 1
                                    WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' THEN   
                                   CAST(CASE WHEN NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1.0000000  
                                 ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15))
                            END   AS decimal(26,7))
                                             ELSE 0.0000000
                      END AS DECIMAL(26,7))*
   CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)),0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)))
    
   * (WDNRTBP.ORIG_UNIT_LIST_PRICE)  AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)      ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT 
  
      FROM
      $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_ACRL_CG NCR
      INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
       ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME) 
      INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
       ON( SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
       AND SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
       ON( NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = SAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
        /*:venketa CHANGE FOR Q1FY15 BY SC-LSS*/
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NBS 
      ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NBS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
     /*END OF CHANGES Q1FY15 BY SC-LSS*/
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
       ON (NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
       AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
       AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
      INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
       ON(NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
       AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL.SS_CODE)
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
       ON (NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
     
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
       ON(NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)
      INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT SSORCTLG
       ON(SSORCTLG.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID = NCR.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID
       AND SSORCTLG.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATLGD
       ON (NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY = SSORCTLG.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY)
      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EORCTL
       ON ( EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
        AND EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME )
     
       LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX NACAR
      ON NACAR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID  = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
      AND NACAR.GLOBAL_NAME     = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME
      
      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
       ON (NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE =ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)
      
      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO    
       ON (NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID = SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  
       AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SSO.SS_CODE)
      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV   
       ON (SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT   
       ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
        /* rchettri: added as a part of Lot-2A CG1 implementation */  
      LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL  
        ON (NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID = NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT  
        AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSOL.SS_CODE) 
      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_INV
       ON(NCCDR_INV.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE 
       AND NCCDR_INV.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE
       AND NCCDR_INV.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NCR.GL_DT 
       AND NCCDR_INV.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate')
      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_FUNC
       ON (NCCDR_FUNC.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE
       AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD'
       AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NCR.GL_DT 
       AND NCCDR_FUNC.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate') 
      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_ACRL_EXT_QTY_OM WDNRTEQ
       ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = WDNRTEQ.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
       AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = WDNRTEQ.GLOBAL_NAME)
      LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_ACRL_BASE_PRC_OM WDNRTBP
       ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = WDNRTBP.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
       AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = WDNRTBP.GLOBAL_NAME)
   /*  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_TRXNL_PERCENT_OM TLP
     ON (TLP.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID=NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID)*/
	 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_TRXNL_PERCENT_acrl_CG TLP
  ON NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = TLP.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
	 
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX NRA
     ON NRA.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY=NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL1
    ON NRA.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
       LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_TRXNL_PURC_ADJ_PCT_ACRL_OM WIPA
    ON(NATL1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT=WIPA.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = WIPA.GLOBAL_NAME)
     WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
       WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
       AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)   AND NRA.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD='Accruals_OM'
     ) A

SELECT  
    NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID  TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
    NCR.GLOBAL_NAME    GLOBAL_NAME,
    CAST(COALESCE(
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG,'N') = 'Y' 
      THEN 0.0000000 
      ELSE ( CASE WHEN NCR.TRX_TYPE = 'CM' 
          THEN CASE 
              WHEN (NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME  = 'RMA with Credit' 
                 OR
                (UPPER(NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME) ='RMA WITH CREDIT' AND NSOL.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE ='RETURN'))
              THEN CASE  WHEN NRA.ATTRIBUTION_CD='OFFSET'
                         THEN (-1)*(COALESCE(CAST(NRA.ACCRUAL_TRX_QTY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000))
                   ELSE COALESCE(CAST(NRA.ACCRUAL_TRX_QTY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)
             END
              WHEN (EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS')) AND  UPPER(NACAR.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10) = 'CREDIT_REBILL'
              THEN CASE  WHEN NRA.ATTRIBUTION_CD='OFFSET'
                         THEN (-1)*(COALESCE(CAST(NRA.ACCRUAL_TRX_QTY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000))
                   ELSE COALESCE(CAST(NRA.ACCRUAL_TRX_QTY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)
             END
              ELSE 0.0000000
            END
          ELSE CASE  WHEN NRA.ATTRIBUTION_CD='OFFSET'
                     THEN (-1)*(COALESCE(CAST(NRA.ACCRUAL_TRX_QTY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000))
               ELSE COALESCE(CAST(NRA.ACCRUAL_TRX_QTY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)
         END
          END
       )
       *( CASE  WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE ='REV' 
          THEN CAST((CAST(COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)
  *
  
  (COALESCE(CAST(TLP.TRX_LINE_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(27,12)),100)/100)
   AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) 
             * 
             ( CASE WHEN (EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT = 'ORDER ENTRY' OR (EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT = 'ORDER ENTRY TNC' AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME = 'ORDER ENTRY')   /*Added OR : TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ )
                THEN COALESCE(CAST(EOCBILDA.INVOICE_LINE_PERCENTAGE AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)
                WHEN (EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS' , 'DISPUTE','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS'))
                THEN 100.0000000 
                ELSE 100.0000000
              END)/10000
     ) AS DECIMAL(26,7)
            )
          WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' 
          THEN CAST((COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000) 
               * 
               ( CASE WHEN (EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT = 'ORDER ENTRY' OR (EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT = 'ORDER ENTRY TNC' AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME = 'ORDER ENTRY')   /*Added OR : TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ )
                  THEN COALESCE(CAST(EOCBILDA.INVOICE_LINE_PERCENTAGE AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)
                  WHEN (EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS' ,'DISPUTE','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS'))
                  THEN 100.0000000
                  ELSE 100.0000000
                END)/10000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)
            )
          ELSE 100.0000000
        END)
      END , 0.0000000 ) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) EXTENDED_QUANTITY ,
  
    CAST(COALESCE(
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG,'N') = 'Y' 
      THEN 0.0000000 
      ELSE ( CASE WHEN NCR.TRX_TYPE = 'CM' 
          THEN CASE 
              WHEN (NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME  = 'RMA with Credit' 
                 OR
                (UPPER(NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME) ='RMA WITH CREDIT' AND NSOL.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE ='RETURN'))
              THEN CASE  WHEN NRA.ATTRIBUTION_CD='OFFSET'
                         THEN (-1)*(COALESCE(CAST(NATIL.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY  AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000))
                   ELSE COALESCE(CAST (NATIL.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)
             END
              WHEN (EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS'))
     AND  UPPER(NACAR.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10) = 'CREDIT_REBILL'
              THEN CASE  WHEN NRA.ATTRIBUTION_CD='OFFSET'
                         THEN (-1)*(COALESCE(CAST(NATIL.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY  AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000))
                   ELSE COALESCE(CAST (NATIL.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)
             END
              ELSE 0.0000000
            END
          ELSE CASE  WHEN NRA.ATTRIBUTION_CD='OFFSET'
                         THEN (-1)*(COALESCE(CAST(NATIL.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000))
                   ELSE COALESCE(CAST (NATIL.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY  AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)
             END
          END
       )
       *( CASE  WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE ='REV' 
          THEN CAST((CAST(COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)
    
    * COALESCE(CAST(TLP.TRX_LINE_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(27,12)),100)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
             * 
             ( CASE WHEN (EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT = 'ORDER ENTRY' OR (EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT = 'ORDER ENTRY TNC' AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME = 'ORDER ENTRY')   /*Added OR : TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ )
                THEN COALESCE(CAST(EOCBILDA.INVOICE_LINE_PERCENTAGE AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)
                WHEN (EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS' , 'DISPUTE','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS')) 
                THEN 100.0000000 
                ELSE 100.0000000
              END)/10000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)
            )
          WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' 
          THEN CAST((COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000) 
               * 
               ( CASE WHEN (EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT = 'ORDER ENTRY' OR (EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT = 'ORDER ENTRY TNC' AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME = 'ORDER ENTRY')   /*Added OR : TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ )
                  THEN COALESCE(CAST(EOCBILDA.INVOICE_LINE_PERCENTAGE AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)
                  WHEN (EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ( 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS' ,'DISPUTE','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS'))
                  THEN 100.0000000
                  ELSE 100.0000000
                END)/10000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)
            )
          ELSE 100.0000000
        END)
      END , 0.0000000 ) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) TOP_EXTENDED_QUANTITY  
  FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_ACRL_CG  NCR
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX NRA
  ON NRA.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY=NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
  ON NRA.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
  ON NRA.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
  ON(NRA.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
  
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
  
  /*INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_TRXNL_PERCENT_MERK_CG TLP
  ON NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = TLP.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID*/
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_TRXNL_PERCENT_acrl_CG TLP
  ON NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = TLP.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
  ON (NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE =ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EORCTL
  ON ( EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
  AND EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME )
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_CFI_BE_INV_LNS_DST_AL EOCBILDA
  ON ( EOCBILDA.BE_INVOICE_LINE_DIST_ID = EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15 
  AND EOCBILDA.GLOBAL_NAME= EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME 
  AND EOCBILDA.INVOICE_TYPE = 'Original Line')
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO    
  ON (NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID = SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  
  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SSO.SS_CODE)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV   
  ON (SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT   
  ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
  /* rchettri: added as a part of Lot-2A CG1 implementation */ 
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL   
  ON (NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID = NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT  
  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSOL.SS_CODE)   
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX NACAR
  ON NACAR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID  = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
  AND NACAR.GLOBAL_NAME     = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME                 
AND NRA.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD ='Accruals_OM'

SELECT 
  CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
  AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
  DV_ORDER_LINE_ID,
  SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  GLOBAL_NAME,
  TRX_ORD_LN_PCT,
  DV_PURC_ADJ_PCT_AMT
  FROM (
  SELECT
  EL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
  NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
  EL.DV_ORDER_LINE_ID,
  NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
  CASE WHEN NSOL.UNIT_SALE_PRICE=0 THEN CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7))
    WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('INV','DM')
    THEN CAST(NATIL.RU_DEBIT_UNIT_AMOUNT/NSOL.UNIT_SALE_PRICE AS DECIMAL(26,7))
    WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('CM')
    THEN CAST(NATIL.RU_CREDIT_UNIT_AMOUNT/NSOL.UNIT_SALE_PRICE AS DECIMAL(26,7))
    ELSE 0
  END 
  TRX_ORD_LN_PCT,
  CAST(
  (CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('INV','DM')
        THEN NATIL.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY
     ELSE NATIL.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY END) *
  TRX_ORD_LN_PCT * COALESCE(NSPA.ADJSTD_USD_AMT,0) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS DV_PURC_ADJ_PCT_AMT
  FROM
  (SELECT CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,GLOBAL_NAME FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_MERK_CG GROUP BY 1,2,3,4) NCR
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX NART
  ON NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY=NART.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
  ON (NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NART.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  AND NATIL.SS_CODE=NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EL
  ON (NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT=EL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
  AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME=EL.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
   ON(SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
   AND SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
  ON ( NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = SAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
    ON (NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
    AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
    AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
  ON (NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT=EL.DV_ORDER_LINE_ID
  AND NSOL.SS_CODE=EL.GLOBAL_NAME)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SO_LINE_PRICE_ADJUSTMENT NSPA
  ON NSPA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
  AND NSPA.SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_DESCR='Purchase Adjustment'  AND NSPA.SS_CD<>'OPL' AND NART.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD='Accruals_om' )A GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7

SELECT 
   TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
  ,GLOBAL_NAME
  ,ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD
  ,ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD
  ,DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD
  ,DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD
  ,SALES_ORDER_KEY
  ,BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  ,SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  ,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  ,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
  ,AR_TRX_KEY
  ,SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  ,PRODUCT_KEY
  ,DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY
  ,SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM
  ,TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
  ,CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM
  ,MAJOR_LINE_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY
  ,DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD
  ,SERVICE_TYPE_CD
  ,DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD
  ,WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY
  ,SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME
  ,BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
  ,SHIPPED_DT
  ,CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT
  FROM
  (
  SELECT
     NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
     NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
     NCR.ACCOUNT_CLASS ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
   CASE WHEN NRA.FUTURE_BILLING_PROCESS_FLG='Y' THEN CAST('Future Billing System' AS CHAR(30))    
   WHEN (NFDM.BK_DEAL_ID IS NOT NULL AND TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV') THEN CASE WHEN DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y' THEN 'As Invoiced-FCM Service' ELSE 'As Invoiced-FCM Product' END
   ELSE  'As Invoiced' END ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
     NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE as DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD,
     NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE as DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
     SMSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
     CASE WHEN NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY>0 THEN NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ELSE NSO.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
     /*CASE WHEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0  THEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
                ELSE NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
    END as SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,*/
	CASE WHEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY>0 THEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ELSE NSOL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
     NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
    SMSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
     NRA.AR_TRX_KEY AR_TRX_KEY,
     CASE WHEN NAT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY>0 THEN NAT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ELSE NSO.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
     COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY, -998)  PRODUCT_KEY,
     -9980  as DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY ,
     NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER AS SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM, 
       CASE
   WHEN NRA.FUTURE_BILLING_PROCESS_FLG='Y' THEN NCR.TRX_TYPE                      
   WHEN (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE 'ICMS%'  OR ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'AR-REBILLING')  AND NAT.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL' AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='INV' THEN 'DM' 
   WHEN EL_TRX.SECONDARY_INV_FLG = 'Y' AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN 'DM'
   ELSE NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE END AS TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
     NAT.RU_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
     NSOL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY MAJOR_LINE_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
     NSO.PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE  DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
     NSOL.REVENUE_TYPE_CODE  SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
     COALESCE(NSO.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS  DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD,
     NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY ,
     NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME AS SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
     NSOL.RU_BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
     COALESCE(CAST(NSS.DD_SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DT AS DATE) , CAST(NCR.TRANSACTION_DATE AS DATE)) SHIPPED_DT,
     CAST(NAT1.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT,
    CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,2) ='41' THEN 'Y' 
    WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,2) ='42' THEN 'Y'
    WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,3)='433' THEN 'Y' 
    ELSE 'N' 
    END DV_SERVICE_FLG
 /*  CASE
   WHEN NRA.FUTURE_BILLING_PROCESS_FLG='Y' THEN NCR.TRX_TYPE                      
   WHEN ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE 'ICMS%' AND NAT.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL' AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='INV' THEN 'DM' 
   WHEN EL_TRX.SECONDARY_INV_FLG = 'Y' AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN 'DM'
   ELSE NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE END AS DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD */
     FROM
     $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_ACRL_CG NCR 
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX NRA
       ON NRA.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY=NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
     INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
      ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
      ON NRA.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
       ON(NATL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
        INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
       ON( NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE         
       AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
       AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT. BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE )  
       INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
       ON(NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT=  NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID)
       INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT1
       ON ( NAT.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY = NAT1.AR_TRX_KEY) 
    
   
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SMSO
      ON (SMSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT =  NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID               
      AND SMSO.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
     
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
      ON (SMSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY  = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY )
     
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT
      ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME) 
     
      LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOL
      ON (SMSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT =  NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID                 
      AND SMSOL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_SHIPMENTS NSS 
      ON (SMSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY )  
     
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL
      ON (SMSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ) 
    
     LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
      ON NSOL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE= NCIO.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE
      
    LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE  ABT
    ON ABT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
   /*START:Added as part of FY16-JUNE-CDR:thvarghe*/
   /*Selected the distinct FCM deals as part of FY17-AUG-CDR*/  
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT BK_DEAL_ID FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FCM_DEAL_MAPPING GROUP BY 1) NFDM
   ON NFDM.BK_DEAL_ID=NSO.BK_DEAL_ID
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORDER_HEAD_EXT ERP
   ON (ERP.HEADER_ID=NSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT AND ERP.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME )  
  LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX EL_TRX
   ON NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = EL_TRX.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
   AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EL_TRX.GLOBAL_NAME  
  /*END:Added as part of FY16-JUNE-CDR:thvarghe*/ 
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
       WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
       AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
    AND (  SMSO.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL  )
    AND (  NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NOT NULL  )
    AND (  NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME IS NOT NULL  )
    AND (  SMSOL.SS_CODE IS NOT NULL   )
    AND (  NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL   )
     and NRA.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD='Accruals_om'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
    NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
    NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
    NCR.ACCOUNT_CLASS ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
   CASE WHEN NRA.FUTURE_BILLING_PROCESS_FLG='Y' THEN CAST('Future Billing System' AS CHAR(30))    
   WHEN (NFDM.BK_DEAL_ID IS NOT NULL AND TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV') THEN CASE WHEN DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y' THEN 'As Invoiced-FCM Service' ELSE 'As Invoiced-FCM Product' END
   ELSE  'As Invoiced' END ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
    NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE as DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD,
    NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE as DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
    SMSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY AS  SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
    NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
    CASE WHEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0  THEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
    ELSE NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
    END as SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
    NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
    -7777 SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
    NRA.AR_TRX_KEY AR_TRX_KEY,
    NAT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
    COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY, -998)  PRODUCT_KEY,
    -9980 as DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_KEY ,
    CAST ( NULL AS VARCHAR(50) ) as SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM,
       CASE
   WHEN NRA.FUTURE_BILLING_PROCESS_FLG='Y' THEN NCR.TRX_TYPE                      
   WHEN (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE 'ICMS%'  OR ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME  = 'AR-REBILLING')  AND NAT.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL' AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='INV' THEN 'DM' 
   WHEN EL_TRX.SECONDARY_INV_FLG = 'Y' AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN 'DM'
   ELSE NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE END AS TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
    NAT.RU_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
    -7777 MAJOR_LINE_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY , 
    NSO.PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE  DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
    CAST ( NULL AS VARCHAR(32) ) as SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
    COALESCE(NSO.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS  DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD,
    -999 WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY ,
    NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME AS SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
    NULL  BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
    CAST(NCR.TRANSACTION_DATE AS DATE) SHIPPED_DT,
    CAST(NAT1.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT,
      CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,2) ='41' THEN 'Y' 
    WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,2) ='42' THEN 'Y'
    WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,3)='433' THEN 'Y' 
    ELSE 'N' 
    END DV_SERVICE_FLG/* ,
   CASE
   WHEN NRA.FUTURE_BILLING_PROCESS_FLG='Y' THEN NCR.TRX_TYPE                      
   WHEN ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE 'ICMS%' AND NAT.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL' AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='INV' THEN 'DM' 
   WHEN EL_TRX.SECONDARY_INV_FLG = 'Y' AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN 'DM'
   ELSE NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE END AS DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD */
    FROM
     $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_ACRL_CG NCR
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX NRA
    ON NRA.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY=NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
    ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
    ON NRA.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
    ON(NRA.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT1
       ON ( NAT.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY = NAT1.AR_TRX_KEY) 
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
    ON( NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE         
    AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
    AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT. BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE )  
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
    ON(NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT=  NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID)
     
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SMSO
   ON (SMSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT =  NCR.ORDER_NUMBER               
   AND SMSO.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
   ON (SMSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY  = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY )
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT
   ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME) 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE  ABT
    ON ABT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
   /*START:Added as part of FY16-JUNE-CDR:thvarghe*/
   /*Selected the distinct FCM deals as part of FY17-AUG-CDR*/  
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT BK_DEAL_ID FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FCM_DEAL_MAPPING GROUP BY 1) NFDM
   ON NFDM.BK_DEAL_ID=NSO.BK_DEAL_ID
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORDER_HEAD_EXT ERP
   ON (ERP.HEADER_ID=NSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT AND ERP.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME )  
  LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX EL_TRX
   ON NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = EL_TRX.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
   AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EL_TRX.GLOBAL_NAME  
  /*END:Added as part of FY16-JUNE-CDR:thvarghe*/ 
     WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
      WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
      AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
    AND ( SMSO.SS_CODE  IS NOT NULL  )
    AND ( NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY  IS NOT NULL)
    AND ( NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME  IS NOT NULL )      and NRA.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD='Accruals_om'
    )T
