SELECT 
    NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
    NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
    COALESCE(CAST(NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT * COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100.0000000)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)   GL_DISTRIB_FUNC_AMT,
    CAST(COALESCE(NCR.AMOUNT * COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100)/100,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
    CAST(COALESCE(NCR.REBATE_AMOUNT,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))     REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
    CAST(
        COALESCE(
        (   CAST
          ( CAST((CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'REV' THEN CAST(NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7))
            WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' THEN  CAST(NCR.AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
             CASE WHEN ACRL.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 
             ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) 
             END 
            ELSE 0.0000000
           END) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
          CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
          COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)/100
          ),0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,  /* NO CHANGE IN DERIVATION SINCE IMMEDIATE ALSO HOLD SAME.*/
   CASE WHEN NCR.TRX_TYPE='ERP_ADJ' THEN 0.0000000 ELSE 
      CAST(COALESCE(
     CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG,'N') = 'Y' 
       THEN 0.0000000 
       ELSE ( CASE WHEN NCR.TRX_TYPE = 'CM' 
              THEN CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM'  AND NBS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','AR-TRXN-EXT')
       THEN Coalesce(Cast(NATIL.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)
       ELSE 0.000000 END
             ELSE  COALESCE(CAST(NATIL.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000) -- NAT enhancements: changing from Accrual to NATIL table as TOP Qty needs to taken from Parent table
             END
           )
        *( CASE  WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE ='REV' 
           THEN CAST((CAST(COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)
   *
   (COALESCE(CAST(TLP.TRX_LINE_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(27,12)),100)/100)
    AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) /100) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
           WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' 
           THEN CAST((COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000) /100)
                AS DECIMAL(26,7))
           ELSE 100.0000000
         END)
       END , 0.0000000 ) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) END AS TOP_EXTENDED_QUANTITY   ,
    COALESCE(CAST(
      CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG ,'N') = 'Y' THEN 0.0000000 ELSE
      ( CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM' THEN  0.0000000
             ELSE TOP_EXTENDED_QUANTITY 
           END) 
      END *  (WDNRTBP.DV_REV_BASE_PRICE_AMT)  AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)   DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT , 
    0.0000000 DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT,   /* for xaas its always 0*/
    /*CASE WHEN NCR.TRX_TYPE='ERP_ADJ' THEN 0.0000000 ELSE ACRL.ACCRUAL_TRX_QTY END AS DV_EXTENDED_QTY,  */ /*commented as part of prod fix*/
    --CASE WHEN NCR.TRX_TYPE='ERP_ADJ' THEN 0.0000000 ELSE TOP_EXTENDED_QUANTITY END AS DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
    --/* DIDN'T TAKE CONDITIONS FOR QTY IN OA_S RECHECK */
/* Modifying DV_EXTENDED_QTY logic as part of NAT Enhancements*/
   CASE WHEN NCR.TRX_TYPE='ERP_ADJ' THEN 0.0000000 ELSE 
      CAST(COALESCE(
     CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG,'N') = 'Y' 
       THEN 0.0000000 
       ELSE ( CASE WHEN NCR.TRX_TYPE = 'CM' 
              THEN CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM'  AND NBS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','AR-TRXN-EXT')
       THEN Coalesce(Cast(ACRL.ACCRUAL_TRX_QTY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)*-1
       ELSE 0.000000 END
             ELSE  COALESCE(CAST(ACRL.ACCRUAL_TRX_QTY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)
             END
           )
        *( CASE  WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE ='REV' 
           THEN CAST((CAST(COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)
   *
   (COALESCE(CAST(TLP.TRX_LINE_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(27,12)),100)/100)
    AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) /100) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
           WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' 
           THEN CAST((COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000) /100)
                AS DECIMAL(26,7))
           ELSE 100.0000000
         END)
       END , 0.0000000 ) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) END DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
    
CASE WHEN NCR.TRX_TYPE='ERP_ADJ' THEN 0.0000000 ELSE 

CAST((CASE  WHEN ACRL.ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED' 
                THEN(ACRL.OFFR_ATTR_PCT/100.0000000) ELSE (1) END) *  /*1 for STANDALONE Data*/
       (CAST(
       COALESCE(
       (CAST( CAST(((CASE WHEN ACRL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD in 'BSFT-OPL' 
                           THEN (NSOLN.UNIT_LIST_PRICE) 
                      ELSE 0.0000000 
                      END) * 
           CASE WHEN ACRL.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 
           ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) 
           END 
          ) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
        CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
        (COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)/100)
        * COALESCE(CAST(TLP.TRX_LINE_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(27,12)),100)/100
		/* * 
   CASE WHEN ACRL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT-OPL') THEN
   Coalesce(Cast((Cast(Cast(NSOLN.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM AS DATE) -  Cast(NSOLN.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM AS DATE) AS INTEGER)*12(FLOAT))/365 AS DECIMAL(15,5) ),1)
   ELSE 1 END */
   
        ),0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 


END 		 DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT,
    CAST
       (COALESCE(
        CAST(CAST(
        CAST(COALESCE(NCR.REBATE_AMOUNT,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
        CASE WHEN ACRL.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1.000000 
         ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15))  END AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
        CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(26,7))*
        CAST(COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100) AS DECIMAL(26,7))/100,0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))     DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT,
     
     CAST((CASE  WHEN ACRL.ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED' 
                 THEN(ACRL.OFFR_ATTR_PCT/100.0000000) ELSE (1) END) *  /*1 for STANDALONE Data*/
        (CAST(
        COALESCE(
        (CAST( CAST(((CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('INV') 
                            THEN ((-1)*NATIL.DEBIT_PURC_ADJSTMT_TRXL_AMT) /*As we are getting -ve amount from source*/
                       ELSE 0.0000000  /* HERE FOR Immediate IT AUTOMATICALLY BECOMES 0*/
                       END) * 
            CASE WHEN ACRL.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 
            ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) 
            END 
           ) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
         CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) * 
         (COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)/100)
         * COALESCE(CAST(TLP.TRX_LINE_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(27,12)),100)/100
         ),0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ) AS DECIMAL(26,7))    DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT,
   
       COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)/100 * 
 COALESCE(CAST(/*CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(26,7))*/ 
 (CAST(COALESCE(cast( CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'REV' THEN 1
                                    WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' THEN   
                                   CAST(CASE WHEN ACRL.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1.0000000  
                                 ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15))
                            END   AS decimal(26,7))
                                             ELSE 0.0000000
                      END AS DECIMAL(26,7))*
   CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)),0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)))*
      (WDNRTBP.ORIG_UNIT_LIST_PRICE)  AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)   ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT,
   
   COALESCE(CAST(
      CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG ,'N') = 'Y' THEN 0.0000000 ELSE
      ( CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM' THEN  0.0000000
             ELSE TOP_EXTENDED_QUANTITY 
           END) 
      END * /* CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(26,7))*/
(CAST(COALESCE(cast( CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'REV' THEN 1
                                    WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' THEN   
                                   CAST(CASE WHEN ACRL.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1.0000000  
                                 ELSE CAST(NCCDR_INV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15))
                            END   AS decimal(26,7))
                                             ELSE 0.0000000
                      END AS DECIMAL(26,7))*
   CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)),0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)))  *
      (WDNRTBP.ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE)  AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)    ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT,
                
CASE WHEN (NBS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT') OR NATIL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME  IN 'XAAS') THEN  
                CASE WHEN NCR.TRX_TYPE='ERP_ADJ' THEN 0.0000000 ELSE 
      Cast(Coalesce(
     CASE WHEN Coalesce(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG,'N') = 'Y' 
       THEN 0.0000000 
       ELSE ( CASE WHEN NCR.TRX_TYPE = 'CM' 
              THEN CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM'  --AND NBS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','PP-XAAS%')
       THEN Coalesce(Cast(ACRL.ACCRUAL_TRX_QTY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)*-1
       ELSE 0.000000 END
             ELSE  Coalesce(Cast(ACRL.ACCRUAL_TRX_QTY AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.0000000)
             END
           )
        *( CASE  WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE ='REV' 
           THEN Cast((Cast(Coalesce(Cast(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000)
   *
   (Coalesce(Cast(
   CASE WHEN    TLP.TRX_LINE_PERCENT =0.00 THEN
   CASE WHEN ACRL.TSV_TRXL_AMT=0  AND ACRL.FUTURE_BILLING_PROCESS_FLG='N' AND ACRL.SEQUENCE_ID <=1 THEN 100.000 -- handling TLP of 0$ trxns
   ELSE TLP.TRX_LINE_PERCENT  END END 
   AS DECIMAL(27,12)),100)/100)
    AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) /100) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
           WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'INV' 
           THEN Cast((Coalesce(Cast(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000) /100)
                AS DECIMAL(26,7))
           ELSE 100.0000000
         END)
       END , 0.0000000 ) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) END 
				END AS XAAS_TRXN_QTY  
    FROM
    $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_ACRL_CG NCR
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
     ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
      
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX ACRL
    ON (ACRL.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY=NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY)
    
    INNER JOIN (SELECT UNIQUE_ID,LEDGER_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXCFIR_REV_ACRL GROUP BY 1,2) EL
    ON ACRL.SK_LINE_REF_NUM=EL.UNIQUE_ID
    
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
    ON(EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = EL.LEDGER_ID)
    
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
    ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
     
    INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_ACRL_BASE_PRC_CG WDNRTBP
    ON (WDNRTBP.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID=NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID)
   
    INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_TRXNL_PERCENT_ACRL_CG TLP
    ON (TLP.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID=NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID)
   
    /*INNER JOIN ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
    ON( SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
    AND SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
    */ -- NAT enhancements code fix 
    
   INNER  JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE  NATL
   ON ACRL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON( NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY)
    
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NBS
    ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NBS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY

    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
    ON (NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
    AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
    AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
   
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
    ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=ACRL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY    /*ALL ARE DEFAULT JOINS FOR IMMEDIATE TRXNS*/
    
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
       ON (NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE =ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) 
    
  
    
    /*LEFT OUTER JOIN ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EORCTL
   ON ( EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
   AND EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME )
   LEFT OUTER JOIN ETLVWDB.EL_OM_CFI_BE_INV_LNS_DST_AL EOCBILDA
   ON ( EOCBILDA.BE_INVOICE_LINE_DIST_ID = EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15 
   AND EOCBILDA.GLOBAL_NAME= EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME 
   AND EOCBILDA.INVOICE_TYPE = 'Original Line')
   LEFT OUTER JOIN ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX NACAR
   ON NACAR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID  = NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
   AND NACAR.GLOBAL_NAME     = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME   */  /* NEEDED IF CONDITIONS REQUIRED IN QTY DERIVATION*/
   
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_INV
    ON(NCCDR_INV.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE          
    AND NCCDR_INV.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE
    AND NCCDR_INV.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NCR.GL_DT 
    AND NCCDR_INV.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate')
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_FUNC
    ON (NCCDR_FUNC.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE
    AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD'
    AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= NCR.GL_DT 
    AND NCCDR_FUNC.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate')
	
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOLN
   ON NSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=ACRL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
   AND NSOLN.SS_CODE='OPL'
   AND ACRL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY>0

SELECT 
     NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
     NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
     CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE IN ('INV','REV') THEN 
    (CASE WHEN NPPT.PRODUCT_KEY>0 THEN 
          CAST(( (COALESCE(NPPT.BASE_PRICE,0)/(CASE WHEN NPPT.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT=0 THEN 1 
      ELSE COALESCE(NPPT.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,1) END))*COALESCE(ACRL.OFFR_ATTR_PCT,100)/100.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
      WHEN NPPT_DEF.PRODUCT_KEY>0 THEN 
      CAST(((COALESCE(NPPT.LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,0)/(CASE WHEN NPPT.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT=0 THEN 1 
      ELSE COALESCE(NPPT.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,1) END))*COALESCE(ACRL.OFFR_ATTR_PCT,100)/100.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
      ELSE 0 
       END)
     * CASE WHEN NP.RU_CHARGE_TYPE_CD='Amortized One Time' 
      THEN CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
      ELSE 
         CASE WHEN SOL.BILLING_MODEL_NAME='Monthly Billing' THEN 1
              WHEN SOL.BILLING_MODEL_NAME='Annual Billing' THEN 12
              WHEN SOL.BILLING_MODEL_NAME='Quarterly Billing' THEN 3
                WHEN SOL.BILLING_MODEL_NAME IN ('Prepaid Term','UNKNOWN') THEN 
      (CASE WHEN (NSOLV.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT IS NULL) OR (NSOLV.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT=0 ) THEN 1 ELSE NSOLV.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT END)  /*ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY19 - SIGORANT*/
         END 
      END
      ELSE 0
     END
     USD_BASE_PRICE,
	 
	 CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE IN ('INV','REV') THEN 
     CAST(((COALESCE(SOL.ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_TRXL_AMT,0)/(CASE WHEN NPPT.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT=0 THEN 1 
       ELSE COALESCE(NPPT.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,1) END))*COALESCE(ACRL.OFFR_ATTR_PCT,100)/100.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
     ELSE 0
      END
      ORIG_UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
	  
    CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE IN ('INV','REV') THEN 
     CAST(((COALESCE(SOL.ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_TRXL_AMT,0)/(CASE WHEN NPPT.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT=0 THEN 1 
       ELSE COALESCE(NPPT.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,1) END))*COALESCE(ACRL.OFFR_ATTR_PCT,100)/100.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
       
      * CASE WHEN NP.RU_CHARGE_TYPE_CD='Amortized One Time' 
       THEN CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
       ELSE 
          CASE WHEN SOL.BILLING_MODEL_NAME='Monthly Billing' THEN 1
               WHEN SOL.BILLING_MODEL_NAME='Annual Billing' THEN 12
               WHEN SOL.BILLING_MODEL_NAME='Quarterly Billing' THEN 3
                 WHEN SOL.BILLING_MODEL_NAME IN ('Prepaid Term','UNKNOWN') THEN 
       (CASE WHEN (NSOLV.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT IS NULL) OR (NSOLV.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT=0 ) THEN 1 ELSE NSOLV.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT END)  
          END 
       END
       ELSE 0
      END
      ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
	
     FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_ACRL_CG NCR
     INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
      ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
     INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX ACRL
     ON ACRL.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY=NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
     INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
     ON NP.ITEM_KEY=ACRL.DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY             
     /*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCRPTN_ATTRBTN    BKG_OA
    ON BKG_OA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=ACRL.OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT  -- DEFAULT VALUE IN BKG_OA IS -9999. ATR_PCT : 0. where as in acrl : its -999*/
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SOL
     ON SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=ACRL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER SO
     ON SOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY=SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV  NSOLV 
     ON SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SUBSCRIPTION_PRDT_PRC_TV NPPT
     ON(    
     NPPT.PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
     AND NPPT.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME = SO.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME
     AND NPPT.BK_VERSION_NUM_INT=SOL.PRICE_VERSION_NUM_INT 
     AND NPPT.PLAN_TYPE_NM=COALESCE(SOL.CONFIG_PRC_QUOTE_PLAN_NM ,'UNKNOWN')  
     AND  NPPT.PRICING_FORMULA_CD<>'Rate Table')
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SUBSCRIPTION_PRDT_PRC_TV NPPT_DEF
     ON(    
     NPPT_DEF.PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
     AND NPPT_DEF.BK_VERSION_NUM_INT=SOL.PRICE_VERSION_NUM_INT
     AND NPPT_DEF.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME = 'Global Price List - US'  
     AND NPPT_DEF.PLAN_TYPE_NM=COALESCE(SOL.CONFIG_PRC_QUOTE_PLAN_NM ,'UNKNOWN') 
     AND NPPT_DEF.PRICING_FORMULA_CD<>'Rate Table')
     WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
     WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
     AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
     AND (SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL)   
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
    NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
    NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
    0 USD_BASE_PRICE,
	0 ORIG_UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
	0 ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
    FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_RA_ACRL_CG NCR
    WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCCA_WEEE_FEE_HDRS EXWFH
    WHERE NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = EXWFH.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID
    AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EXWFH.GLOBAL_NAME)
